chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3077 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) For orders on office objection. For hearing of M.A No.13450/18. For hearing of M.A No.847/19. For hearing of main case. 27-03-2019. Mr. Abdul Hafeez Solangi, Advocate for intervener. Mr. Wali Muhammad Jamari, Asst: Advocate General. = Learned A.A.G has filed statement alongwith comments of respondent No.4, taken on record. However, Mr. Badaruddin Khoso, who is associate of Mr. Ayaz Ali Rajpar, learned counsel for the petitioner does not press this petition on the ground that grievance of the petitioner has been redressed. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application[s]. JUDGE JUDGE *Fahad Memon*
